hero.headline: Your team doesn't need to figure out AI alone.
hero.sub: We work alongside your team, map how your business actually runs, and bring in AI that fits — not just tools that look good on a slide.

problems.title: You're not the only one stuck here.

items.title: Everything lives in someone's head
items.desc: Your processes depend on the right people being available. When they're not, things break.

items.title: AI feels urgent but impossible to start
items.desc: You know you need to move on AI. But between the noise, the options, and the day-to-day, it never happens.

items.title: Big consultants aren't the answer
items.desc: You don't need a six-figure engagement or a 200-slide deck. You need someone who actually gets their hands dirty.

tiers.label: Tier 1
tiers.name: Squaimap
tiers.partnership: The smartest first step before changing anything.
tiers.description: Every Squai engagement starts here. We get inside your business, study how your team actually works, find what's slowing you down, and map where AI can make a real difference. Then we sit down together, walk through the findings, and agree on the path forward.
items: A deep dive into your operations — how your team works today, where the friction is, and what's costing you time and money
An AI opportunity map showing exactly where AI can help, based on your tools, team, budget, and readiness
A written findings report with clear, prioritized recommendations
A live session where we walk through everything together and agree on next steps
tiers.priceNote: Fixed price. Included in every tier — never skipped, never rushed.

tiers.label: Tier 2
tiers.name: Squailab
tiers.partnership: Take what we learned and build systems your team will actually use.
tiers.description: We take the Squaimap findings and get to work. Together we decide which workflows matter most right now — then we document them properly, make them accessible to your whole team, and bring in AI where it makes the most sense for how your business actually runs.
items: Everything in Squaimap
3 to 5 core workflows fully mapped and documented — clear enough that anyone on your team can follow them
Operational playbooks delivered inside the tools your team already uses
AI implementations across your priority workflows, with scope defined together during Squaimap
A closing session so your team knows how to manage everything we built
1 week of post-delivery support
tiers.priceNote: Final scope and price confirmed after the Squaimap closing session.

tiers.label: Tier 3
tiers.name: Squaicore
tiers.partnership: A complete operational system so your business runs on process, not on people.
tiers.description: This is the full build. We go deep across your entire operation — mapping every critical workflow, building a complete playbook your business can run on, and implementing AI wherever it creates real leverage. Then we train your team hands-on so they're fully equipped to operate and grow long after we're gone.
items: Everything in Squaimap
6 to 10 core workflows fully mapped, documented, and interconnected
A complete operational playbook covering your entire business
AI implementations across all priority workflows, with scope defined collaboratively during Squaimap
A data integrity review so your decisions are built on reliable, well-connected information
An information security review so your processes and tools handle sensitive data responsibly
Full team training — hands-on, process-by-process, and built for real use
2 weeks of post-delivery support
tiers.priceNote: Final scope and price confirmed after the Squaimap closing session.

howItWorks.title: How It Works

steps.name: Discovery Call
steps.description: A free 30-minute call with your Operations Strategist. We learn about your business and recommend the right engagement.

steps.name: Proposal in 48hrs
steps.description: You receive a clear proposal within 48 hours — exact scope, deliverables, timeline, squad members, and investment. No ambiguity.

steps.name: Kickoff
steps.description: Once approved we schedule a kickoff session with your key stakeholders. This is where the work officially begins.

steps.name: Mapping & Building
steps.description: The squad works through the engagement week by week. Regular check-ins and early previews — no big reveals at the end.

steps.name: Delivery
steps.description: All deliverables handed off in your preferred tools and formats. We adapt to how your team works — not the other way around.

steps.name: Support Period
steps.description: 1 to 2 weeks of post-delivery support for questions, adjustments, and onboarding your team to new processes and tools.

howItWorks.subtitle: A proven, structured approach to scaling your operations inside out.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
items: SaaS & Tech Startups
E-Learning & Education
Professional Services
Digital E-Commerce
Agencies & Consultancies

items.title: A squad, not a solo consultant
items.desc: Real people with defined roles working inside your business — not a chatbot, not a framework, not a slide deck.

items.title: We speak your language — literally
items.desc: English or Spanish. Notion or Confluence. We meet you where you are and work the way your team works.

items.title: Practical AI, not theoretical
items.desc: We don't hand you a tool list and leave. We implement what fits your team's actual comfort level and make sure it sticks.

items.title: We build for when we're gone
items.desc: Everything we build is meant to be owned and run by your team. Our job is done when you don't need us anymore.

squad.title: Meet Your Squad
squad.sub: Every engagement assigns the right people to your specific needs. You always work directly with the people doing the work.

members.desc: Your main point of contact from day one. Diagnoses your business, designs the operational roadmap, and keeps the entire engagement on track.
Builds the AI solutions identified in Squaimap. Custom automations and tool integrations designed around how your team actually works — not generic fixes.
Maps how your team actually works day to day — not how it's supposed to on paper. Finds where things slow down or break, and connects every fix to something that matters.
Turns everything we build into clear, structured documentation that lives inside your team's existing tools — so anyone can follow it, not just the people who were in the room.
Makes sure the data running through your processes is actually reliable. Finds where information is missing, disconnected, or leading to bad decisions — and fixes it.
Reviews how your processes, tools, and documentation handle sensitive data. Makes sure everything we build follows security best practices — so your business is protected as it grows.

ctaSection.headline: Ready to meet your squad?
ctaSection.sub: A real squad, a free 30-minute call. No commitment, no pressure — just an honest conversation about where you are and where you want to go.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: Squai is responsible for processing the personal data collected through this website. If you have any questions, you can reach us at heysquai@gmail.com.

sections.heading: What data we collect
sections.body: When you use our contact form, we collect your name, email address, and the message you write. We do not collect any other personal data.

sections.heading: Why we collect it
sections.body: We use your data solely to respond to your inquiry. We will not use it for marketing, profiling, or any other purpose.

sections.heading: Third parties
sections.body: To deliver our response to you, we use Resend as our email-sending service. Your data may be processed by this provider in accordance with their own privacy policy. We do not share your data with anyone else.

sections.heading: How long we keep your data
sections.body: We keep your data for up to 1 year after your inquiry. After that period, it is permanently deleted.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also withdraw your consent. These rights apply regardless of where you are located.

sections.heading: How to exercise your rights
sections.body: To exercise any of these rights, send us an email at heysquai@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.

footer.tagline: Your team doesn't need to figure out AI alone.
